items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of AI-generated parameters but lacks concrete evidence to confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear failure report. The evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces from the simulation of the persona scenario, making it impossible to assess the outcome deterministically. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary data to support the expected results.
